turns.user_message: I've noticed I'm just not as sharp as I used to be. My focus is off today.
This foggy feeling has been hanging around for a few weeks now. I can't seem to shake it no matter what I try.
My mind feels completely blank and numb all the time. It's like I've lost the ability to think clearly at all.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with something they noticed about themselves. This has been going on for a while.
